# BiblioFuse — Comic & eBook Reader

BiblioFuse is a cross-platform comic and ebook reader app available on iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and the Web. It supports CBZ, CBR, EPUB, PDF, and ZIP formats, with cloud sync, streaming, and a built-in web reader.

## Key pages
- https://bibliofuse.com/en/ — Homepage and app overview
- https://bibliofuse.com/en/webapp — Web App (read in browser, no install needed)
- https://bibliofuse.com/en/blog/ — Blog: guides, tips, and how-tos for comic and ebook readers
- https://bibliofuse.com/en/about — About BiblioFuse
- https://bibliofuse.com/sitemap.xml — Full sitemap

## App downloads
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/app/bibliofuse/id6470965906
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bibliofuse.app
- macOS: https://apps.apple.com/app/bibliofuse/id6470965906
- Windows (PC Reader): available on the Microsoft Store

## Content
Blog articles cover topics including: reading CBZ/CBR files on iPhone, converting ZIP to CBZ, reading manga and webtoons on mobile, cloud storage integration, and cross-device comic syncing.

## Permissions
Content on this site may be crawled, indexed, and used to inform AI-generated answers. Attribution appreciated but not required.
